# P-Note

> P-Note is an AI-powered thinking and note-taking companion that verifies, corrects, and expands your knowledge as you write.

P-Note organizes learning into Groups → Lessons → Notes. As you take notes, an AI reviewer checks your understanding, fixes mistakes, and generates supplemental notes so you can level up faster. Progress is tracked over time with an AI-driven level and XP system.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing and onboarding for new users.
- [Sign in](/auth): Email and Google authentication.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Overview of your learning activity and stats.
- [Groups](/groups): Browse and manage your knowledge groups.
- [AI Review](/ai-review): AI-powered review of your notes with corrections and expansions.
- [Profile](/profile): Your level, XP, progress chart, and AI progress analysis.
- [Settings](/settings): Language (English / Arabic) and account settings.
